info.title: Moralis Universal API 🚧
info.description: This API is in early access and is subject to change.

get.description: Returns all derived addresses and their transfer counts for a given Bitcoin xpub key.

parameters.name: publicKey
parameters.description: The Bitcoin extended public key (xpub)

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

get.summary: Get derived addresses from a Bitcoin extended public key (xpub).

get.description: Returns full block data including transactions, logs, token transfers, and internal transactions for a given chain and block number or block hash.

parameters.name: blockIdentifier
parameters.description: The block number (integer) or block hash (hex string) to retrieve. All-digit values are interpreted as block heights. Any other value is forwarded as a hash.

parameters.name: enrich
parameters.description: Master switch for ABI decoding enrichment (method labels, decoded logs, decoded input). Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeMethodLabel
parameters.description: Include method labels on transactions (overrides enrich).

parameters.name: decodeInput
parameters.description: Decode transaction input data (overrides enrich).

parameters.name: decodeLogs
parameters.description: Decode log events (overrides enrich).

parameters.name: includedTopicZeros
parameters.description: Whitelist logs by topic0 (comma-separated hex values).

parameters.name: excludeFields
parameters.description: Fields to exclude from response (comma-separated: logs, internalTransactions, tokenTransfers, etc.).

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

get.summary: Get a block by chain and block number or hash

get.description: Returns full transaction data including logs, token transfers, and internal transactions for a given chain and transaction hash.

parameters.name: txHash
parameters.description: The transaction hash to retrieve

parameters.name: enrich
parameters.description: Master switch for ABI decoding enrichment (method labels, decoded logs, decoded input). Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeMethodLabel
parameters.description: Include method labels on the transaction (overrides enrich).

parameters.name: decodeInput
parameters.description: Decode transaction input data (overrides enrich).

parameters.name: decodeLogs
parameters.description: Decode log events (overrides enrich).

parameters.name: includedTopicZeros
parameters.description: Whitelist logs by topic0 (comma-separated hex values).

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

get.summary: Get a transaction by chain and transaction hash

get.description: Get OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) candlestick data for a specific pair address.

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

parameters.name: pairAddress
parameters.description: The address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to the next page

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: The time interval of the candles

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The starting date (format in seconds or datestring accepted by momentjs)

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The ending date (format in seconds or datestring accepted by momentjs)

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: The currency of the candles

parameters.name: connectedCandles
parameters.description: Whether to use connected candles ("open" value of the candle is equal "close" value of the previous candle)

get.summary: Get the OHLCV candle stick by using pair address

get.description: Returns all DeFi positions (lending, liquidity, staking) for a wallet address across specified chains in a unified schema.

parameters.name: walletAddress
parameters.description: The address

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Chains to query

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of positions to return per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page

get.summary: Get DeFi positions for a wallet across multiple chains

get.description: Returns DeFi positions for a wallet address filtered by a specific protocol across specified chains.

parameters.name: walletAddress
parameters.description: The address

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol identifier (e.g. "aave-v3", "uniswap-v3")

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Chains to query

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of positions to return per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page

get.summary: Get DeFi positions for a specific protocol

get.description: Returns a summary of all DeFi positions for a wallet address across specified chains.

parameters.name: walletAddress
parameters.description: The address

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Chains to query

get.summary: Get DeFi positions summary for a wallet across multiple chains

get.description: Get all swap related transactions (buy, sell, add liquidity & remove liquidity) for a specific pair address.

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

parameters.name: pairAddress
parameters.description: The address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to the next page

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order of items

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description:
The start date from which to get the swaps (format in seconds or string accepted by momentjs)
* Provide the param 'fromBlock' or 'fromDate'
* If 'fromDate' and 'fromBlock' are provided, 'fromBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description:
The end date from which to get the swaps (format in seconds or string accepted by momentjs)
* Provide the param 'toBlock' or 'toDate'
* If 'toDate' and 'toBlock' are provided, 'toBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: fromBlock
parameters.description:
The minimum block number from which to get the swaps
* Provide the param 'fromBlock' or 'fromDate'
* If 'fromDate' and 'fromBlock' are provided, 'fromBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: toBlock
parameters.description: The block number to get the swaps until

parameters.name: transactionTypes
parameters.description: Transaction types to fetch. Possible values: 'buy', 'sell', 'addLiquidity' or 'removeLiquidity' separated by comma

get.summary: Get all swap related transactions (buy, sell, add liquidity & remove liquidity)

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

parameters.name: tokenAddress
parameters.description: The address

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to the next page

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description:
The start date from which to get the swaps (format in seconds or string accepted by momentjs)
* Provide the param 'fromBlock' or 'fromDate'
* If 'fromDate' and 'fromBlock' are provided, 'fromBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description:
The end date from which to get the swaps (format in seconds or string accepted by momentjs)
* Provide the param 'toBlock' or 'toDate'
* If 'toDate' and 'toBlock' are provided, 'toBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: fromBlock
parameters.description:
The minimum block number from which to get the swaps
* Provide the param 'fromBlock' or 'fromDate'
* If 'fromDate' and 'fromBlock' are provided, 'fromBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: toBlock
parameters.description: The block number to get the swaps until

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order of the results, in ascending (ASC) or descending (DESC).

parameters.name: transactionTypes
parameters.description: Transaction types to fetch. Possible values: 'buy','sell' or both separated by comma

get.summary: Get all swap related transactions (buy, sell)

get.description: Get the current price and additional information for a specific token address.

native.summary: The native token of the chain

get.summary: Get the price of a token by its address

get.description: Get a small set of historical price points suitable for sparkline charts (tiny charts in token lists, watchlists, portfolio rows). Returns a fixed number of points based on the selected range.

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

parameters.name: tokenAliasOrTokenAddress
parameters.description: The token address or alias

native.summary: The native token of the chain

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: The time range for the sparkline. Determines the interval and window size.

get.summary: Get sparkline price data for a token

get.description: Get historical price data points for a specific token address, suitable for rendering line charts. Supports various time intervals from 5 minutes to monthly.

parameters.name: chainAlias
parameters.description: The alias of the chain.

parameters.name: tokenAliasOrTokenAddress
parameters.description: The token address or alias

native.summary: The native token of the chain

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to the next page

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The time interval for price data points. Defaults to 5m if not provided.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The starting date (format in seconds or datestring accepted by momentjs). Defaults to 24 hours before toDate if not provided.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The ending date (format in seconds or datestring accepted by momentjs). Defaults to now if not provided.

parameters.name: forwardFill
parameters.description: When true, fills gaps in the time series with interpolated values

get.summary: Get historical price time-series for a token

get.description: Get token balances from multiple chains for a specific wallet address.

parameters.name: walletAddressOrPublicKey
parameters.description: The address or public key of the account

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Chains to query

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to the next page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit per page

parameters.name: tokenAddresses
parameters.description: The token addresses to be filtered in

parameters.name: excludeSpam
parameters.description: Should exclude spam contract

parameters.name: excludeUnverifiedContracts
parameters.description: Should exclude unverified contract

parameters.name: excludeNative
parameters.description: Should exclude native contract

parameters.name: maxTokenInactivity
parameters.description: Should filter out contract exceeding max token inactivity

parameters.name: liquidityThreshold
parameters.description: Should filter out contract under liquidity threshold

get.summary: Get token balances from multiple chains for a specific wallet address.

get.description:
Get enriched wallet transaction history using ClickHouse pointers and Envelope Service hydration.

**Supported chain families:**
- **EVM** — Ethereum, Polygon, BSC, etc. Includes native, ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 transfers.
- **Bitcoin** — Native BTC transfers only.
- **Solana** — Native SOL transfers.

Cross-family requests (e.g. EVM address with Bitcoin chain) return 400. When no `chains` param is provided, all mainnets for the detected address family are queried.

parameters.name: walletAddressOrPublicKey
parameters.description: The address or public key of the account

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: Chains to query

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit per page

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: The cursor to the next page

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order of items

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description:
The start date from which to get the wallet history (format in seconds or string accepted by momentjs)
* Provide the param 'fromBlock' or 'fromDate'
* If 'fromDate' and 'fromBlock' are provided, 'fromBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description:
The end date from which to get the wallet history (format in seconds or string accepted by momentjs)
* Provide the param 'toBlock' or 'toDate'
* If 'toDate' and 'toBlock' are provided, 'toBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: fromBlock
parameters.description:
The minimum block number from which to get the wallet history
* Provide the param 'fromBlock' or 'fromDate'
* If 'fromDate' and 'fromBlock' are provided, 'fromBlock' will be used.

parameters.name: toBlock
parameters.description: The block number to get the wallet history until

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: When true, returns full raw chain-specific data including logs, input data, and vin/vout arrays. Array fields are capped at 100 items with a hasMore flag.

get.summary: Get wallet transaction history across multiple chains.

The cursor to be used for getting the next page of results

fromDate.description: The starting date of the time series in ISO 8601 format

toDate.description: The ending date of the time series in ISO 8601 format

interval.description: The time interval used for the price data points

result.description: The list of price data points

cursor.description: The cursor to be used for getting the next page of results

addressType.description: Address type derived from chain family (evm for Ethereum-compatible, bitcoin for BTC, solana for Solana)

cursor.description: Opaque cursor token for pagination (null when no more pages)

pageSize.description: Number of items in this page

meta.description: Response metadata with sync status and diagnostics

transfers.description: Number of transactions involving this address

syncedAt.description: Last ingested block number per chain ID

difficulty.description: Block difficulty (also present on Bitcoin blocks)

uncles.description: Uncle block hashes (JSON array as string)

bits.description: Target difficulty bits in compact representation

difficulty.description: Block difficulty (also present on EVM blocks)

miscJson.description: Raw chain-specific block data as JSON. Provisional — structure subject to change when SDK adds explicit Solana block fields.

txid.description: UTXO input transaction ID (Bitcoin only, null for EVM/Solana)

vout.description: UTXO output index spent by this input (Bitcoin only, null for EVM/Solana)

sequence.description: UTXO input sequence number (Bitcoin only, null for EVM/Solana)

hex.description: Script hex (Bitcoin only, null for EVM/Solana)
Script hex (Bitcoin only, null for EVM/Solana)

cumulativeGasUsed.description: Cumulative gas used in block up to this transaction

transactionType.description: Transaction type (0 = legacy, 1 = EIP-2930, 2 = EIP-1559, 3 = EIP-4844)

miscJson.description: Raw Blockbook miscJson. Null when successfully parsed into structured fields (vin/vout, version, locktime, etc.)
Raw chain-specific transaction data as JSON. Provisional — structure subject to change when SDK adds explicit Solana transaction fields.

open.description: The open price in the specified currency

close.description: The close price in the specified currency

high.description: The high price in the specified currency

low.description: The low price in the specified currency

volume.description: The volume in the specified currency

trades.description: The number of swaps in this candle period

syncedAt.description: Last sync block position for each chain in the response. The literal 'latest' indicates the chain is synced up to the latest block (no pinned block number available).

unsupportedChains.description: Requested chains that are not supported

failedChains.description: Requested chains that are not supported

name.description: The name of the native token

symbol.description: The symbol of the native token

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the last price update

blockNumber.description: The block number of the last price update

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the price point in ISO-8601 format

price.description: The price in USD at this timestamp

possibleSpam.description: If the token is a spam contract

verifiedContract.description: If the token is a verified contract

balance.description: The formatted balance of the token

securityScore.description: The security score of the token

portfolioPercentage.description: The percentage of token relative to wallet's portfolio

usdPrice24hrUsdChange.description: The token 24hr change in USD price

usdPrice24hrPercentChange.description: The token 24hr change in USD price percent

usdValue24hrUsdChange.description: The balance 24hr change in USD price

nativeToken.description: If the token is a native token

derivedAddress.description: The derived Bitcoin address (only present for xpub token balance queries)

derivedPath.description: The BIP44 derivation path (only present for xpub token balance queries)

transaction.description: Transaction information with transfers and enrichment

raw.description: Chain-family-specific raw data (only the matching chain family key is present)

syncedAt.description: Per-chain indexed block height (-1 while real sync metadata is unavailable)

unsupportedChains.description: Chain IDs that were requested but are not supported (null when all chains supported)

failedChains.description: Chain IDs where fetching failed (null when no failures occurred)

missingTransactions.description: Per-chain count of transactions that could not be enriched (null when none missing)

chainId.description: Chain ID of the failed chain

code.description: Error code for the failed chain

error.description: Error message for the failed chain
error.example: Failed to fetch data from the chain

direction.description: Transaction direction relative to the queried wallet

possibleSpam.description: Whether the transaction is likely spam

initiatedBy.description: Address that initiated the transaction (null at tx level on FullTransactionResponse)

to.description: Transaction recipient (null for contract creation transactions)

nativeTransfers.description: Native currency transfers in this transaction

methodId.description: 4-byte function selector from input (null if no input or input too short)

contractAddress.description: Contract address created (null unless contract creation)

input.description: Full transaction input data as hex (verbose only)

decodedInput.description: Decoded input data (verbose only, null if not decoded)

logs.description: Transaction logs capped at 100 items with hasMore flag (verbose only)

address.description: Contract address that emitted the log

internalTransactions.description: Internal transactions capped at 100 items with hasMore flag (verbose only)

coinbase.description: Whether this is a coinbase transaction

rbf.description: Whether the transaction signals replace-by-fee (any vin sequence < 0xFFFFFFFE)

entity.description: Entity information associated with the address

amount.description: Fee amount formatted to native decimals

direction.description: Transfer direction relative to the queried wallet

isInternal.description: Whether this is an internal (trace-level) transfer

value.description: Transfer value (raw, in token smallest unit)

direction.description: Transfer direction relative to the queried wallet
Transfer direction relative to the queried wallet

gasUsed.description: Gas actually used by the transaction

effectiveGasPrice.description: Effective gas price after EIP-1559 (null for legacy txs)

maxFeePerGas.description: Max fee per gas for EIP-1559 (null for legacy txs)

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: Max priority fee per gas for EIP-1559 (null for legacy txs)

cumulativeGasUsed.description: Cumulative gas used in the block up to this tx
